resources.name: Revenue Operations Agent
resources.description: AI agent for revenue pipeline analysis, customer health scoring, deal risk assessment, and churn prediction. Answers natural-language questions about customers, orders, support, and call intelligence.
representative_queries: Which deals are most at risk this week?
What is the average customer health score by region?
Which customers are most likely to churn in the next 30 days?
Show me Q1 win rates by product category
resources.data_scope: Revenue operations data: customers, orders, feedback, support, call intelligence
